package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoroutineSpawnInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "goroutine_spawn_in_loop"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Raw go statements launched from inside loops without obvious WaitGroup coordination."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
